goal: pointwise_add_apply
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, g, t)

goal: pointwise_mul_apply
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, g)

goal: pointwise_zero_apply
proof: function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)

goal: pointwise_one_apply
proof: function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)

goal: pointwise_neg_apply
proof: function[T0: Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)

goal: pointwise_inverse_apply
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { x0(x1).inverse = pointwise_inverse[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) = f(t) + (g(t) + h(t))
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](g, h, t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t) = f(t) + g(t) + h(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, g, t)
function[T0: AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](f(t), g(t), h(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) = pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t)
proof: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) != f(t) + g(t) + h(t)
pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) = f(t) + g(t) + h(t)

goal: pointwise_add_assoc
pointwise_add[T, A](f, g, t) = f(t) + g(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, g, t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](g, f, t) = g(t) + f(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](g, f, t)

goal: f(t) + g(t) = g(t) + f(t)
proof: function[T0: AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](g(t), f(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f, g, t) = pointwise_add[T, A](g, f, t)
proof: pointwise_add[T, A](f, g, t) != g(t) + f(t)
pointwise_add[T, A](f, g, t) = g(t) + f(t)

goal: pointwise_add_comm
pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) = f(t) + A.0
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t)
function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
f(t) + pointwise_zero[T, A](t) != f(t) + A.0
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) = f(t)
proof: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) != f(t) + A.0

goal: pointwise_add_zero_right
pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) = A.0 + f(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t)
function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_zero[T, A](t) + f(t) != A.0 + f(t)
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) = f(t)
proof: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) != A.0 + f(t)

goal: pointwise_add_zero_left
pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_neg[T, A](f), t) = f(t) + -f(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, pointwise_neg[T, A](f), t)
function[T0: Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_neg[T, A](f), t) = pointwise_zero[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_neg[T, A](f), t) = A.0
pointwise_add[T, A](f, pointwise_neg[T, A](f), t) != A.0

goal: pointwise_add_neg_right
pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f), f, t) = -f(t) + f(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f), f, t)
function[T0: Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f), f, t) = pointwise_zero[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f), f, t) = A.0
pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f), f, t) != A.0

goal: pointwise_add_neg_left
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h), t) = f(t) * (g(t) * h(t))
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h))
function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](g, t, h)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), h, t) = f(t) * g(t) * h(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), t, h)
function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, g)
function[T0: Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[A](f(t), g(t), h(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h), t) = pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), h, t)
proof: f(t) * (g(t) * h(t)) = pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), h, t)
f(t) * (g(t) * h(t)) != pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), h, t)

goal: pointwise_mul_assoc
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g, t) = f(t) * g(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, g)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](g, f, t) = g(t) * f(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](g, t, f)

goal: f(t) * g(t) = g(t) * f(t)
proof: function[T0: CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[A](g(t), f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g, t) = pointwise_mul[T, A](g, f, t)
proof: f(t) * g(t) = pointwise_mul[T, A](g, f, t)
f(t) * g(t) != pointwise_mul[T, A](g, f, t)

goal: pointwise_mul_comm
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_one[T, A], t) = f(t) * A.1
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, pointwise_one[T, A])
function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
f(t) * pointwise_one[T, A](t) != f(t) * A.1
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_one[T, A], t) = f(t)
proof: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_one[T, A], t) != f(t) * A.1

goal: pointwise_mul_one_right
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_one[T, A], f, t) = A.1 * f(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](pointwise_one[T, A], t, f)
function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_one[T, A](t) * f(t) != A.1 * f(t)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_one[T, A], f, t) = f(t)
proof: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_one[T, A], f, t) != A.1 * f(t)

goal: pointwise_mul_one_left
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), t) = f(t) * f(t).inverse
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, pointwise_inverse[T, A](f))
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { x0(x1).inverse = pointwise_inverse[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)

goal: f(t) * f(t).inverse = A.1
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), t) = pointwise_one[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), t) = A.1
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), t) != A.1

goal: pointwise_mul_inverse_right
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), f, t) = f(t).inverse * f(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), t, f)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { x0(x1).inverse = pointwise_inverse[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f, t)

goal: f(t).inverse * f(t) = A.1
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0.inverse * x0 = T0.1 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), f, t) = pointwise_one[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), f, t) = A.1
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_inverse[T, A](f), f, t) != A.1

goal: pointwise_mul_inverse_left
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) = f(t) * (g(t) + h(t))
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h))
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](g, h, t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), t) = f(t) * g(t) + f(t) * h(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, h)
function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, g)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), t)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[A](f(t), g(t), h(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t) = pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, g), pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), t)
proof: f(t) * g(t) + f(t) * h(t) = pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t)
f(t) * g(t) + f(t) * h(t) != pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_add[T, A](g, h), t)

goal: pointwise_mul_distrib_left
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t) = (f(t) + g(t)) * h(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), t, h)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f, g, t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h), t) = f(t) * h(t) + g(t) * h(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](g, t, h)
function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, h)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h), t)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[A](f(t), h(t), g(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t) = pointwise_add[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f, h), pointwise_mul[T, A](g, h), t)
proof: f(t) * h(t) + g(t) * h(t) = pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t)
f(t) * h(t) + g(t) * h(t) != pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f, g), h, t)

goal: pointwise_mul_distrib_right
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) = f(t) * A.0
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f, t, pointwise_zero[T, A])
function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
f(t) * pointwise_zero[T, A](t) != f(t) * A.0
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) = pointwise_zero[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) = A.0
pointwise_mul[T, A](f, pointwise_zero[T, A], t) != A.0

goal: pointwise_mul_zero_right
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) = A.0 * f(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](pointwise_zero[T, A], t, f)
function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_zero[T, A](t) * f(t) != A.0 * f(t)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[A](f(t))

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) = pointwise_zero[T, A](t)
proof: function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) = A.0
pointwise_mul[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], f, t) != A.0

goal: pointwise_mul_zero_left
